site.name: Voyantic
site.tagline: Researched travel guides, verified data, and planning tools for the world's most popular destinations.

home.heroTitle: Plan smarter trips with verified facts, not filler.
home.heroSubtitle: Deep destination guides built from primary sources, regularly checked travel data, and calculators the AI answers can't replace.

footer.disclosureShort: Some links on this site are affiliate links. We may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.

newsletter.title: Get one useful trip idea a week
newsletter.subtitle: Verified guides and data — no spam, unsubscribe anytime.
newsletter.consent: By subscribing you agree to our privacy policy.

guides.title: Travel guides
guides.description: Deep, research-based guides to the world's most popular destinations — verified facts, not filler.

data.title: Travel data
data.description: Verified, regularly updated numbers: trip costs, transport, seasonality and opening hours — every figure with a source and a check date.

destinations.title: Destinations
destinations.description: Practical hubs for the world's most popular destinations — guides, verified data, tours and car hire in one place.
destinations.empty: New material for this destination is on the way.

about.title: About Tripify
about.intro: Tripify publishes travel guides and data built from research and primary sources — not from invented personal trips. Our aim is that every number you read is traceable to an official source and a date it was checked.
about.methodologyBody: Each guide starts from official sources: tourist boards, transport operators, museums and government visa portals. We record prices, opening hours, route numbers and seasonal windows, and we store the source and check date alongside every factual block.
about.sourcesBody: Every page lists its sources with the date each was verified, and shows a "data checked" badge. When a price is uncertain we publish a range and label it orientative rather than presenting a guess as fact.
about.authorshipBody: Tripify is written and reviewed by an editorial team that researches and verifies data. We do not fabricate first-person travel experiences, and we do not use AI-generated photographs of real places.

disclosure.title: Affiliate disclosure
disclosure.body: Some links on Tripify are affiliate links. If you book or buy through them we may earn a commission, at no extra cost to you. This never changes the prices you pay, and it does not influence which places, tickets or operators we recommend — those choices follow our research and sources.

tools.title: Travel tools
tools.description: Free calculators and planners to price and shape your trip — no sign-up required.
tools.comingSoon: Our budget calculator, trip planner and car-rental comparison are launching soon.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Questions, corrections and partnership enquiries are welcome. We especially value corrections: if a price or detail looks out of date, tell us and we will re-check it against the source.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body: We collect the minimum needed to run the site: your email address only if you subscribe, and anonymous, aggregated analytics. We never sell personal data, and affiliate clicks are logged without personal identifiers.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.
